awards.title: Top performance rating (PBC)
awards.description: Rated in the top performance category in IBM’s Personal Business Commitment (PBC) year-end evaluation for two consecutive years, reflecting consistent delivery and impact.

awards.title: Manager’s Choice Award
awards.description: Quarterly recognition nominated by my manager for demonstrating values and behaviors that drive team and business outcomes. Recipients are acknowledged across the organization.

certifications.name: IBM Certified Advocate - Cloud v2
certifications.description: Foundational certification in cloud computing basics, IBM Cloud platform essentials, and cloud deployment models.

certifications.name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
certifications.description: Validates foundational understanding of AWS Cloud services, security and compliance, and cloud concepts.

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals
certifications.description: Demonstrates knowledge of AI and machine learning concepts and Azure services for building AI solutions.
